data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether the cancellation of an initial booking affects downstream appointments, as specified in the requirement. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation of the system's behavior when an appointment is skipped or canceled, nor does it demonstrate that downstream appointments are automatically canceled or notified. This constitutes a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not support the expected behavior outlined in the use case.
gaps: No evidence of downstream appointments being canceled or notified when an initial booking is skipped or canceled.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
